title: Hero Merge
description: Hero Merge is an exciting tower defense game where strategy and firepower combine! Merge your heroes to create stronger units, strategically position them on grid, and defend your wall against waves of different enemies. Unlimited waves, plenty of perks and many different units! Will your heroes stand strong, or will the enemies break through?

title: Apocalypse Rush
description: Apocalypse Rush is a fast-paced survival game where you must defend your trailer against endless waves of enemies! Arm yourself with various weapons, collect coins for upgrades, and try to survive as long as possible. The longer you last, the more challenging the game becomes! Are you ready for the chaos?

title: Hide Heist
description: Hide &amp; Heist is a single-player game where player control two characters &ndash; the smart and the strong. The smart excels at open locks and hacking systems, while the strong excels at eliminating guards and breaking through obstacles. Players must strategically utilize both characters unique abilities to sneak into secure corporate offices and banks, execute the heist, and escape undetected. The gameplay combines actions, strategy, stealth, and quick thinking, offering an engaging and challenging experience.
